productDisplayName: French Connection Women Black Sling Bag
description: Style Note french connection, the edgy, attitudinal, high street British fashion brand sets out to create well-designed and fashion-forward bags with a quirky spin on design. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and organiser pockets that allow you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the fcuk handbags provides you with a superb array of ideas.  Product Details Black handbag with a broad flap fastened by magnetic closure and another metallic clasp One main compartment with a zippered pocket inside Flap design on the front One short handle to carry style and ease One long adjustable handle  Material and Care Shell: 100% polyester and lining 100% polyurethane Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight Size Height: 24 cm Width: 33 cm Depth: 11 cm
